# Last Z Guides

Last Z Guides is an independent static guide site for Last Z.

Preferred URL: https://lastzguides.com/
Sitemap: https://lastzguides.com/sitemap.xml
Contact: https://lastzguides.com/contact.html
About: https://lastzguides.com/about.html
Disclosure: https://lastzguides.com/disclosure.html
Privacy: https://lastzguides.com/privacy.html

Primary topics:
- Last Z research order and badge planning
- Alliance Duel schedule, rewards, and event timing
- HQ upgrade requirements and late-game progression
- Hero priorities, factions, and formations
- F2P strategy, resources, steel, and account growth
- Redeem codes and official Gift Center flow

Key guides:
- https://lastzguides.com/research.html
- https://lastzguides.com/alliance-duel.html
- https://lastzguides.com/events.html
- https://lastzguides.com/hq.html
- https://lastzguides.com/heroes.html
- https://lastzguides.com/f2p.html
- https://lastzguides.com/steel.html
- https://lastzguides.com/codes.html

Editorial approach:
- answer-first guide structure with page-specific checks, generated data, or owner validation where noted
- guides are periodically reviewed and updated when major changes are made
